title: chionolaena jeffreyi
intro: Chionolaena jeffreyi is a plant species native to the Hawaiian Islands, belonging to the family Asteraceae. It is often used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions. Chionolaena jeffreyi can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and topical salves for various medicinal uses.
